messages.content:
Elena,

You closed a $15M Series A 74 days ago with 8 open engineering roles. Peer companies show public signals of dedicated AI leadership roles. How are you structuring yours?

We deploy ML engineers ready in 7 days, embedded in your stack with 3-hour Pacific overlap. Not a staffing agency — a delivery team.

Worth 15 minutes Thursday or Friday to walk through? → cal.com/tenacious/ai

Elena
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelli

Alex,

You closed $15M Series A 74 days ago with 8 engineering roles open. Teams with 8+ roles typically take months to fill specialized AI leadership positions.

We deliver Chief Scientist-level talent embedded in your stack, Pacific time overlap, ready in 14 days — delivery team, not staffing agency.

Worth 15 minutes next Wednesday? → [Cal link]

Alex  
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelli

Priya,

You closed a $15M Series A 74 days ago and have 8 open engineering roles. Series A AI companies often struggle with feature drift without automated MLOps checks.

We embed senior ML engineers experienced in setting up drift tests and schema validation. No staffing agency — a dedicated delivery team.

Worth 15 minutes Tuesday or Wednesday? → [Cal link]

Elena
Research Partner, Tenacious

Priya,

You closed a $15M Series A 74 days ago with 8 open engineering roles. MLOps feature validation is a common bottleneck for scaling AI teams.

We embed engineers for automated drift tests and schema checks — ready in 14 days, 3-hour Pacific overlap. Not a staffing agency.

Priya

Priya,

DataSync AI closed a $15M Series A 74 days ago with 8 engineering roles open. Post-Series A teams commonly face quality degradation as AI feature velocity increases. 

We deploy MLOps engineers who automate drift testing and schema validation for every feature push — like Tecton and Hopsworks in your peer group. 

Worth 15 minutes tomorrow? → [cal.link]

Priya

Priya,

You closed a $15M Series A 74 days ago and have eight engineering roles open publicly. Tecton and Hopsworks automate MLOps drift tests for each feature push — most companies at your stage lack this capability.

We deploy ML engineers to build automated validation pipelines, ready to scale within 7 days. Can we discuss this in 15 minutes Wednesday? → [Cal link]

Priya
Research Partner, Tenacious
